name: Demetrious Johnson
oneLiner: The defining UFC flyweight champion: historic title control, elite technical dominance, and one of the cleanest prime skill sets in the sport.
compareShortCase: DJ is the flyweight standard: historic title control, elite technical completeness, and one of the cleanest dominance cases in the ranking.
compareCounter: DJ's best counterargument is skill and cleanliness. He may not have the biggest names, but his technical control and consistency are almost impossible to ignore.
compareWeakness: The only real drag is division depth. DJ's skill and dominance are elite, but the flyweight opponent pool does not score like welterweight or lightweight.
